description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle is equipped with a detachable curved box magazine, typical of the AK-pattern family, and a canvas sling attached for carrying. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple slant-cut muzzle device. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a front post and a rear notch, providing basic aiming capability. The overall finish combines the natural grain of the wood with the matte black of the metal components, giving it a utilitarian yet robust appearance. The rifle's construction suggests durability and reliability, suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, detachable curved magazine, and iron sights, finished with a canvas sling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and attached sling.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile, barrel tip, and alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the sling draped below.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
